taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Software Engineering, Backend Software Engineer
core_skills: Ruby on Rails, React Native, TypeScript, Python, PostgreSQL
skill_match_scores: Ruby on Rails:0.0, React Native:1.0, TypeScript:1.0, Python:1.0, PostgreSQL:1.0
must_have_quals: At least 4 years industry experience of using Ruby on Rails, Passionate about making a positive difference in society by improving the financial health of users, Align with company values and engineering principles, Experience in building data models, APIs, and business logic services, Ability to deliver work using agile methodologies and tools like tests, observability, AB-tests, and feature flags, Experience in analyzing data to identify problems and generate new ideas, Ability to mentor colleagues and support their development, Experience in collaborating with cross-functional teams including engineers, designers, and analysts
core_responsibilities: Joining a cross-functional product squad and collaborating with a mix of engineers, designers, analysts and other disciplines to develop features that enhance our users' financial health, Collaborating with other senior peers in your squad and pillar to provide technical insight into upcoming work, and leading the delivery by helping pull everyone together to get it shipped, Mentoring colleagues to help them grow as engineers and actively supporting their development, Working on our Ruby on Rails monolith, building data models, APIs, and business logic services, Delivering your work using agile methodologies and tools like tests, observability, AB-tests, and feature flags, Analyzing data to identify problems and generate new ideas, using various sources such as our database, application logs, and user research data, Supporting colleagues through in-hours support and optionally joining the compensated out-of-hours on-call rotation, Contributing to cross-cutting concerns that improve our engineering efforts, Taking part in shaping the work of your squad beyond technical aspects, participating in product ideation, user research, design reviews, retrospectives, and more
job_summary: Cleo is a fast-growing fintech company on a mission to change humanity's relationship with money by providing a hyper-intelligent financial advisor. They are seeking a Senior Product Engineer with expertise in Ruby to join a cross-functional team, developing features that enhance users' financial health and mentoring fellow engineers.
